value.found_quote:
from google.adk.tools.mcp_tool import McpToolset
...
    tools=[
        McpToolset(
            connection_params=StdioConnectionParams(
                server_params=StdioServerParameters(
                    command="npx",
                    args=[
                        "-y",
                        "mcp-remote",
                        "https://mcp.asana.com/sse",
                    ]
                ),
                timeout=30,
            ),
        )
    ],
value.rationale: The page explicitly shows ADK's McpToolset (imported from google.adk.tools.mcp_tool) being used to wrap an MCP server connection (Asana's MCP server) and expose its tools to an agent. This directly substantiates the claim that ADK provides a McpToolset connector that wraps an MCP server connection and exposes its tools to an agent, used to integrate third-party MCP servers such as Asana. The page also shows both Python (McpToolset) and TypeScript (MCPToolset) variants, and presents the integration as currently active/generally available with no preview or deprecation notices.
